title: Pontius Scene Items
description: Database schema for the pontius_scene_items Notion database. Each row is a scene-level work unit flowing through the 3-agent writers-room pipeline (Historical Prosecutor -> Canon Steward -> Dramatic Architect). Contracts defined in pontius/writers-room/PONTIUS_LAB_CONTRACTS.yaml.

properties._comment_signals: Timestamp fields that trigger agents. Consume-first idempotency: agent sets *_Consumed_At FIRST, then does work, then stamps next *_Requested_At.

source_grounding_requested_at.description: Entry signal. Set by human or Lab dispatcher. Triggers Historical Prosecutor.

source_grounding_consumed_at.description: Idempotency gate. Set by Historical Prosecutor as FIRST write.

canon_review_requested_at.description: Set by Historical Prosecutor on completion. Triggers Canon Steward.

canon_review_consumed_at.description: Idempotency gate. Set by Canon Steward as FIRST write.

dramatic_architecture_requested_at.description: Set by Canon Steward when all clearances pass (no escalation). Triggers Dramatic Architect.

dramatic_architecture_consumed_at.description: Idempotency gate. Set by Dramatic Architect as FIRST write.

human_review_requested_at.description: Exit signal. Set by Dramatic Architect on completion. Universal — every pipeline run ends here.

scene_revision_requested_at.description: Revision re-entry signal. Set by human after review. Triggers Canon Steward (Contract 4).

scene_revision_consumed_at.description: Idempotency gate for revision path. Set by Canon Steward as FIRST write.

properties._comment_inputs: Fields set before dispatch. These are the writers-room inputs.

episode.description: Episode number. Null for standalone tasks (research queries, character development).

task_type.description: Determines which agents fire and which steps execute. See routing table in WORKFLOW.md.

creative_brief.description: The assignment — what the scene needs to do, dramatic purpose, constraints.

character_list.description: Characters present in the scene. Required for task types that include Step 3 (Full Scene Draft, Character Development, Episode Outline).

prompt_notes.description: Human guidance, escalation resolutions, revision direction. Appended across passes.

revision_pass.description: Monotonically incrementing revision counter. Starts at 1, increments each time Scene Revision Requested At is stamped.

work_item_id.description: Relation to parent Work Item (when dispatched via Lab Path 2). Null for human-initiated scenes.

properties._comment_outputs: Fields produced by agents during pipeline execution.

source_audit.description: Notion page ID of child page containing structured Source Audit (OUTPUT_SCHEMAS Schema 1). Produced by Historical Prosecutor.

provenance_tags.description: Multi-select. Provenance categories present in the source audit.

source_coverage_pct.description: Percentage of scene elements with primary source backing.

source_gap_count.description: Number of scene elements requiring invention (no source exists).

scene_type_classification.description: Primary scene type per SCENE_PROTOCOLS.md. Produced by Canon Steward.

governing_voice.description: Governing dramatic voice per CHARTER.md. Produced by Canon Steward.

character_clearance.description: Notion page ID of child page containing structured Character Clearance (OUTPUT_SCHEMAS Schema 3). Produced by Canon Steward.

motif_clearance.description: Notion page ID of child page containing structured Motif Audit (OUTPUT_SCHEMAS Schema 4). Produced by Canon Steward.

escalation_flags.description: Multi-select. Escalation triggers detected by Steward (or Prosecutor/Architect). When non-empty, Steward does NOT stamp Dramatic Architecture Requested At.

beat_sheet.description: Notion page ID of child page containing structured Beat Sheet (OUTPUT_SCHEMAS Schema 5). Produced by Dramatic Architect.

scene_draft.description: Notion page ID of child page containing Scene Draft in screenplay format (OUTPUT_SCHEMAS Schema 6). Produced by Dramatic Architect.

stress_test_results.description: Notion page ID of child page containing 10-question Stress Test (OUTPUT_SCHEMAS Schema 7). Produced by Dramatic Architect.

stress_test_score.description: Number of stress test questions passed (0-10).

revision_required.description: Set by Dramatic Architect. True if stress test score < 10/10.

pipeline_status.description: Status property. Tracks which phase the scene is in.

escalation_level.description: Severity of current escalation. Critical = character death or premise proximity.

blocked_reason.description: Human-readable detail when escalated. Set by Steward.
